tools.name: fls

input.harness_usage: List directory: extra_args=["-o", "63", "-l", "INODE"] → fls -o 63 -l IMAGE INODE. Use MFT entry number only (e.g. 23117), not name-typed form. Optional @@ in extra_args is ignored (inode always after image).

input.harness_usage: Partition layout/stats: extra_args=["-o", "63"] when image has DOS/MBR table.
